script_text: Many big English words come from Greek and Latin roots.
Knowing roots unlocks tons of vocabulary!
Bio means life. Photo means light. Telephone — far sound.
Aqua means water. Aquarium = water place.
Geo means earth. Geography = writing about earth.
One root unlocks many words. Aqua: aquarium, aquatic, aqueduct!
Now you are ready for Greek and Latin roots!
